● Done. Updated .agents/skills/canvas/SKILL.md with:

   - CLI-First mandate at the top — CLI is the only primary interface
   - --near flag prominently documented with examples for relational positioning
   - --json parsing guidance (strip spinner chars)
   - All examples rewritten to use CLI + --near instead of manual coordinate math
   - Server API demoted to a clearly labeled "Fallback Only" section
   - Procedure steps default to CLI commands throughout
